name: A Traveller's Tale
description: A hooded traveller sits by the fire in the tavern, spinning a tale of a forgotten vault in the eastern crags where an artifact of immense power lies buried.

choices.label: Buy the map
choices.description: It costs you a fair bit of silver, but the promise of power is too great.

choices.label: Dismiss it as a fable
choices.description: You have no time or coin for fairytales.
